summary: Iteration 7 (Main Quests + Port Louis sub-map + focused-pin highlighting + nav rename) verified end-to-end against the public preview URL. BACKEND: 14/14 pytest cases pass in /app/backend/tests/test_iter7_main_quests.py (2.0s) — (1) /api/main-quests returns 4 quests (mq-wayfarer, mq-cascade, mq-heritage, mq-compleat) with full schema (title, subtitle, lore_intro, epilogue, theme_color, theme_hex, icon, tour_ids, discount_pct=50, enrolled, focused, completed, progress{completed,total,percent,completed_tours}); fresh player sees 0/N progress; no Mongo _id leaked. (2) /api/tours catalog now exposes the 2 new waterfalls (t-hike-tamarind-falls, t-chamarel-falls) AND all 6 Port Louis venues (t-pl-aapravasi-ghat/blue-penny/central-market/cathedral/citadelle/champ-de-mars), each with subregion='port-louis', region='central-culture', and numeric city_x / city_y. (3) POST /enroll auto-focuses on first enrol; subsequent enrols leave focus unchanged (verified via GET, since endpoint only echoes focused_main_quest when it updates). (4) POST /focus auto-enrols if not yet enrolled (cascade test). (5) POST /unenroll on the focused quest re-focuses to next enrolled (deterministic, sorted); unenrolling the last enrolled quest clears focus to null. (6) GET /check-completion idempotent — returns newly_completed=[] when the player has no completed bookings, and repeated calls remain empty. (7) Auth gating verified: anon POST /enroll & GET /check-completion both return 401/403. (8) Unknown quest_id returns 404. FRONTEND: (a) Admin login → HUD shows hud-action-saga (Crown) alongside hud-action-map / hud-action-journal / hud-action-bag etc., confirming the new icon. (b) /main-quests renders the 4 saga cards (mq-wayfarer/cascade/heritage/compleat) — each with themed gradient banner (jungle/ocean/sunset/sun), title, subtitle, lore quote, 0% progress bar, tour list, rewards panel, saga value ~Rs 13,500 / 11,000 / 11,150 / 18,800. (c) Click mq-enroll-mq-heritage → toast 'Enrolled in The Heritage Keeper' + heritage card now shows mq-focused-mq-heritage badge + mq-leave-mq-heritage button; The Wayfarer's Trail still shows its Enrol button (unchanged). (d) On /dashboard the focused-quest aura is visible (screenshot confirmed): the North Coast pin and the Port Louis pin both glow sunset-orange (#E27447) with a counter '1' (North Coast: 1 Heritage tour remaining) and '4' (Port Louis: 4 Heritage tours remaining) respectively; Black River / East Lagoons / Le Morne / South-Wild pins remain in their default sand state. (e) After unlocking central-culture in Mongo (admin starts with regions_unlocked=['north-coast'] by design), clicking the Port Louis pin opens RegionScene with the Creole Table Cooking Class tour card AND the 'Enter Port Louis' sub-map card directly underneath (testid='region-enter-port-louis'). (f) Clicking it opens the full-screen city sub-map (testid='port-louis-city-map') showing all 6 venue pins at their city_x/city_y, the orange 'FOCUSED · The Heritage Keeper' banner at the top, and the Aapravasi / Blue Penny / Central Market pins rendered with sunset-orange focused aura + ring (visually verified in screenshot) while the Cathedral / Citadelle / Champ de Mars pins remain in default sand. (g) Clicking the Aapravasi pin opens 'Accept this quest?' booking dialog (testid='pl-book-dialog'). Clicking 'Accept quest' (pl-book-confirm) POSTs /api/bookings (200), dialog closes, toast 'Quest accepted: "Aapravasi Ghat (UNESCO)".' shown. (h) 'Leave Port Louis' (testid='port-louis-back') closes the sub-map and returns to RegionScene. (i) /quests page header now reads 'Side quests' with body text referencing 'Main Quests'.

issues: The 'Focused' yellow badge ribbon on the Heritage card slightly overlaps the toast position when toast lands top-right; minor cosmetic — not blocking.

action_items: Spec naming nit: the review request expected the 'Enter Port Louis' button testid to be 'enter-port-louis' but the actual testid in RegionScene.jsx is 'region-enter-port-louis'. Functionality is fine — only flag if the spec/QA scripts rely on the bare name; otherwise keep as 'region-enter-port-louis' for consistency with other region-* testids.
critical_code_review_comments: main_quests.py /enroll only returns focused_main_quest in its response when it CHANGES (first enrol). Subsequent enrolments return {ok, enrolled_main_quests} without echoing focused_main_quest. The DB is correct, but a consumer relying on the response shape will see an inconsistent contract. Consider always returning both fields for predictability.

main_quests.py /unenroll auto-focuses sorted(list(enrolled))[0] when the unenrolled quest was focused — deterministic but may surprise users (they might expect the most-recently-enrolled or last-focused). Consider tracking focus history.
main_quests.py check_completion uses Python's `import secrets as _s` inside the loop body — works, but conventional style is to import at module top.

main_quests.py reward_code formula `f"{quest_id.upper().replace('-','')}-{token_hex(3).upper()}"` — token_hex(3) = 6 hex chars = ~16.7M possibilities; collisions across users very unlikely but not guaranteed unique. If multiple users complete the same quest concurrently there's a tiny dup risk on user_reward_id. Consider a unique-index check or include user_id in the code.
PortLouisCityMap.jsx labels strip 'Port Louis ' and '(UNESCO)' from t.name; works for current data, but if a future PL venue is named differently the label may render the full string. Minor cosmetic.
PortLouisCityMap.jsx booking POST to /api/bookings is the same shared booking endpoint — confirmed 200 on success. No mock layer; toast text 'Quest accepted' is good UX.
MainQuests.jsx 'Focused' button is hidden when q.focused; there's no 'Unfocus' UX — users can only re-focus via the explicit Focus button on a different quest. Acceptable but worth noting.
MainQuests.jsx aovMur = totalEur * 50 hardcoded — same '1 EUR ~ 50 MUR' assumption is duplicated on the backend (check_completion). Extract to a shared constant for consistency.

Dashboard map pins correctly receive theme_hex via inline style for the aura/ring/counter — visually confirmed via screenshot. Counter '4' on Port Louis includes Creole Table Cooking Class + the 3 PL Heritage venues, which is the spec'd behaviour.
Backend test suite for /main-quests is now 14 cases @ 2s — fast enough to include in CI pre-merge.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all NEW Main Quests, focused-pin aura, Port Louis sub-map, booking dialog, Leave Port Louis, and /quests rename flows verified end-to-end

test_credentials: Admin: admin@andeor.mu / AnDeor2026!. Ephemeral test player created per-pytest-run: TEST_iter7_<ts>@example.com / explore123.
seed_data_creation: Admin was temporarily modified to unlock central-culture (regions_unlocked += 'central-culture', xp set to 600) so the 'Enter Port Louis' button would render. Admin state was RESTORED to its original {regions_unlocked:['north-coast'], xp:0, enrolled_main_quests:[], focused_main_quest:null} after testing. The single test booking created for t-pl-aapravasi-ghat was also deleted. One ephemeral TEST_iter7_* player was created via /api/auth/register (not cleaned up; not blocking).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Main Quests router lives at /api/main-quests prefix (registered in server.py). Quest IDs: mq-wayfarer, mq-cascade, mq-heritage, mq-compleat. Theme hex: jungle=#1B6F4B, ocean=#0F8FA8, sunset=#E27447 (Heritage Keeper), sun=#E8B241. Frontend testids: hud-action-saga (Crown nav icon), mq-{quest_id} card, mq-enroll-{qid}, mq-leave-{qid}, mq-focus-{qid}, mq-focused-{qid} (badge), mq-tour-{qid}-{tour_id}, region-enter-port-louis (RegionScene sub-map button — note: NOT 'enter-port-louis' as some specs say), port-louis-city-map (overlay), port-louis-focused-banner, port-louis-pin-{tour_id} (6 pins), pl-book-dialog, pl-book-confirm, port-louis-back. The Port Louis sub-map renders /port_louis_map.png as the background — confirmed loading. Admin's regions_unlocked is reset to ['north-coast']; to retest Enter Port Louis you must $addToSet central-culture into users.regions_unlocked again. New tour catalog entries (waterfalls + 6 PL venues) are seeded via main_quests.seed_main_quests(db) — idempotent on tour_id.
rca_of_the_issue: No new bugs found. Only one minor naming discrepancy between the review request ('enter-port-louis') and the actual code ('region-enter-port-louis'); functionality is correct. A false-negative in one of my pin-aura JS evaluations (focused aura is rendered via deep child <span> with the hex in style attribute, while my evaluate() only sniffed outerHTML[:400] — the visual screenshot of port-louis-city-map confirms the 3 Heritage Keeper pins ARE highlighted in sunset orange while the other 3 are sand).
